sivChecklist.item: Confirm IRB approval letter and approved protocol version.
sivChecklist.rationale: To ensure that the site is using the currently approved protocol before study initiation.

sivChecklist.item: Confirm investigator CV and GCP training certificate.
sivChecklist.rationale: To verify investigator qualification and GCP training status.

sivChecklist.item: Review delegation log and confirm that study responsibilities are appropriately assigned.
sivChecklist.rationale: To ensure that delegated tasks are performed only by qualified and authorized site staff.

sivChecklist.item: Confirm completion of protocol training for site staff.
sivChecklist.rationale: To reduce protocol deviation risk and ensure consistent study conduct.

sivChecklist.item: Confirm that the site has the latest IRB-approved informed consent form.
sivChecklist.rationale: To ensure that subjects are consented using the appropriate version.

sivChecklist.item: Confirm IP storage condition, receipt process, and accountability log preparation.
sivChecklist.rationale: To ensure proper IP management and traceability.

sivChecklist.item: Confirm AE and SAE reporting process, including reporting timeline and contact information.
sivChecklist.rationale: To prevent delayed safety reporting and ensure subject safety oversight.

sivChecklist.item: Confirm EDC access and eCRF completion guidelines.
sivChecklist.rationale: To support timely and accurate data entry.

imvChecklist.item: Verify signed ICF version, signature date, and consent process documentation.
imvChecklist.rationale: To confirm that informed consent was obtained before any study-specific procedure.

imvChecklist.item: Verify inclusion and exclusion criteria against source documents.
imvChecklist.rationale: To confirm that enrolled subjects meet protocol eligibility requirements.

imvChecklist.item: Compare key source data with eCRF entries for primary endpoint-related data.
imvChecklist.rationale: To ensure data integrity for critical efficacy assessments.

imvChecklist.item: Review AE and SAE documentation and confirm reporting timeline compliance.
imvChecklist.rationale: To ensure complete and timely safety reporting.

imvChecklist.item: Review visit window compliance and missing assessment records.
imvChecklist.rationale: To identify protocol deviations and support corrective actions.

imvChecklist.item: Review IP dispensing, return, storage temperature, and accountability records.
imvChecklist.rationale: To ensure accurate IP accountability and compliance with storage requirements.

imvChecklist.item: Review open queries and query aging status with site staff.
imvChecklist.rationale: To support timely query resolution and improve data quality.

imvChecklist.item: Reconcile site file documents with expected essential document list.
